metaTitle.description: SEO page <title> for the Marketplace page where users browse Namefi domain NFTs listed on OpenSea. Keep brand 'Namefi' untranslated.

metaDescription.description: SEO meta description for the Marketplace page summarizing the browse-and-buy experience for Namefi domain listings on OpenSea. Keep brand names 'Namefi', 'OpenSea', and 'ICANN' untranslated.

title.description: On-page H1 title of the Marketplace page. A short noun for a place to buy/sell domains.

nftAlt.description: Alt text for a domain NFT's artwork image shown on a listing card.

resultCount.description: Count of listings shown above the grid. ICU plural on {count}; '#' renders the number. Keep the ICU syntax intact.

buyOn.description: Link/button label on a listing card to complete the purchase on a marketplace. {marketplace} is the marketplace name, e.g. 'OpenSea' — do not translate the value.

buyAria.description: Accessible label for the whole listing card link. {domain} is the domain name (e.g. 'alice.com'); {marketplace} is the marketplace name (e.g. 'OpenSea'). Keep both placeholders; don't translate their values.

buyNow.description: Primary call-to-action button on a listing card that opens the in-app purchase dialog. Short imperative, e.g. 'Buy Now'.

buyNowAria.description: Accessible label for the 'Buy Now' button. {domain} is the domain name (e.g. 'alice.com'); keep the placeholder, don't translate its value.

viewOnMarketplace.description: Secondary link under the Buy Now button to view the listing on the external marketplace. {marketplace} is the marketplace name (e.g. 'OpenSea') — don't translate the value.

buyDialogTitle.description: Title of the Buy Now confirmation dialog. {domain} is the domain being purchased (e.g. 'alice.com'); keep the placeholder.

buyDialogDescription.description: Subtitle of the Buy Now dialog reassuring the user they'll confirm the final amount in their wallet before any funds move.

buyDialogPriceLabel.description: Row label in the Buy Now dialog for the listing's asking price.

buyDialogNetworkLabel.description: Row label in the Buy Now dialog for the blockchain network the listing is on.

buyDialogFeeNote.description: Small note in the Buy Now dialog clarifying that marketplace + network fees are added and the wallet shows the final total.

buyDialogConfirm.description: Confirm button in the Buy Now dialog that initiates the on-chain purchase. Short imperative, e.g. 'Buy Now'.

buyDialogPending.description: Buy Now confirm button label while the purchase transaction is awaiting the user's wallet signature/confirmation.

buyToastSubmitted.description: Toast shown right after the user confirms, while the purchase transaction is being submitted/mined.

buyToastSuccess.description: Toast shown when the purchase transaction succeeds.

buyToastError.description: Toast shown when the purchase fails or is rejected. Keep it reassuring and actionable.

buyToastRateLimited.description: Toast shown when the purchase can't proceed because OpenSea is rate-limiting / no API key could be obtained. Reassure the user it's temporary and to retry shortly. Keep 'OpenSea' untranslated.

etherSymbolLabel.description: Accessible label (aria-label) for the small info icon next to an ETH price that explains the Ξ symbol. 'ether' is the Ethereum cryptocurrency.

etherSymbolTooltip.description: Tooltip explaining that the Greek letter Ξ (xi) is the symbol for ether, the Ethereum cryptocurrency. Keep the 'Ξ' character and 'ETH' as-is; translate the rest.

approxUsd.description: Approximate US-dollar equivalent shown next to an ETH price. {amount} is a pre-formatted, localized currency string (e.g. '$1,234'). Keep the '≈' (approximately) sign and the {amount} placeholder; do not translate the value.

partialLoadNote.description: Small non-blocking notice shown below the grid when listings from one or more marketplaces/chains failed to load.

emptyTitle.description: Title of the empty state shown when there are no active Namefi listings on OpenSea.

emptyDescription.description: Body text of the empty state shown when there are no active Namefi listings on OpenSea. Keep 'OpenSea' untranslated.

loadFailedTitle.description: Title of the error state shown when listings could not be fetched at all.

loadFailedDescription.description: Body text of the error state shown when listings could not be fetched from OpenSea. Keep 'OpenSea' untranslated.
